textByHash.f20050ef559cb0f1cc38bb5e6b5cdc4ec490ef2f: . We'll soon be ready to seal the tunnel, it's slow work I'm afraid.
textByHash.956ad1407602fca0ef14e99f113f02341c4d41a4: If we do this wrong, we'll bring the entire cavern down upon all of us.
textByHash.9863110ed39308f14aab36ed92c2b7f28f06d443: It would. I don't know about you though, but I intend to survive this day. Bringing the cavern down isn't a good way to achieve that.
textByHash.a8245d3e8f069045c4e71cf7b5818e9cef7d9e09: Back away! Back away! Wait... you're human!
textByHash.dae9dccf58215b15221ebd65cc97e77d7313ef71: Well good luck with that. We came here as miners, completely unaware of the evil that lurked here. There's no way through, not while Iban still rules. He controls the gateway, the only way to the other side.
textByHash.9fcbe61b482e6bf8e7c45c77064220c48ac9321d: The Well of Voyage. It acts as a portal through the last section of the caverns. It's the only way into the west. Iban has corrupted it though. Now he uses it to dispose of those who displease him.
textByHash.4deec45eed9937c1bc77cc20ff4471c9db24e606: Ha! Good luck with that. If we knew how, we'd have slain him already.
textByHash.6fa05ab5b646d2bb1920f87d675da00906bdbca3: Seek out the witch, his guide, his only confidante. Only she knows how to rid us of Iban.
textByHash.848079179e46a864548eabd48f34a73259a2a6ae: She lives on the platforms above, we dare not go there.
textByHash.c57572e9b0bbd69cd17f0a08ec77b6e3c66cad04: You're brave to come to this place. Not many survive down here.
textByHash.eb55efe1b30f9ca262af59a242b451e74fd65664: Don't stay too long traveller. Iban's calls will soon penetrate your delicate human mind.
textByHash.eed57ff523e83ef4b4cf4cc8cabd978d65852688: You'll also become one of his minions... You must go and find the witch Kardia. She holds the secret to Iban's destruction. She lives on the platforms above.
textByHash.d5b538a6fc8151cb4781b56bc34e325c9cfe46a9: Well it's a good job I found it.
textByHash.88c5482076c3e015f0b357d8db46608055042990: I've heard about these dolls. This here be dark magic traveller. They say the witch resurrected Iban from death. She must have used this doll to do it.
textByHash.dfb28eb571eb6160d9ce38aca9078a056c97200b: If this doll created Iban, it can also be his end. Find out what process the witch used to revive him and reverse it. Once that's done, cast it into the Well of Voyage. Iban will be destroyed with it.
textByHash.67b4b1e654870cbee20720b8d6175c5dc5eb90d4: On the platforms above. Within Iban's foul temple.
textByHash.0f180f008a1e81c59da7ece8f6a4f89f27e43fc0: I found this old book as well. It seems to detail how Iban was resurrected. It might hold the information you need to destroy him.
textByHash.c8f5d115b67367182ecf9b5cfad32cdb138c441b: I found this old book by the way. It seems to detail how Iban was resurrected. It might hold the information you need to destroy him.
textByHash.5e5a45b1afb18b757efa80d0921ffcb696f8f79e: Ah, I've heard about these dolls. This here be dark magic traveller. They say the witch resurrected Iban from death. She must have used this doll to do it.
textByHash.79f9b7c265370a398cbdc292d06c210739c5aca2: Traveller, thank the stars you're still around! I thought your time had come.
textByHash.9653a2a64711a4b1e3218d2d76009685bdba7ff6: I found something I think you need traveller...
textByHash.ec35708b4fff9d82ce1561a3d20ff4b7e2f79df4: I found it while slaying some of the soulless. Here you go.
textByHash.9c5cc8486265ca9ea344942f4d05097f2c7170fa: Good luck to you, you'll need it.
textByHash.11717c7addbbabe7a8f2bfd972c54b38e5ec0e4d: Well with Iban and his lot gone, we've been left with a great cavern filled with resources. We thought we'd actually do what we came here for and get mining.
textByHash.e09a60f2aca7cdec7098ad9fbadd66dc58ed144f: Well Iban and his lot are gone and Lord Iorwerth is no longer an issue. That means we've been left with a great cavern filled with resources. We thought we'd actually do what we came here for and get mining.
